highlights.text: Private catamaran Phi Phi & twilight yacht cruise

itinerary.title: Phuket Honeymoon Package
itinerary.tagline: Phuket • Phi Phi Islands • Phang Nga Bay • Patong
itinerary.overview: Ultimate Phuket Honeymoon — private pool villa, catamaran Phi Phi cruise, twilight yacht, couple's spa, James Bond Island, and beachfront candlelight dinner.
itinerary.seo_description: Luxury 04N/05D Phuket honeymoon (TH-006): private catamaran, twilight yacht, couple's spa, and candlelight dinner.

days.title: Arrival in Phuket & Sunset Luxury
days.description: Orchid welcome at Phuket Airport. Transfer to ultra-luxury pool villa with sparkling wine. Private beachfront candlelight dinner.
activities: Evening Experience: Signature beachfront private candlelight dinner
Overnight Stay: Phuket (Ultra-Luxury Private Pool Villa)

days.title: Phi Phi Islands by Private Catamaran
days.description: Private catamaran to Maya Bay, Pileh Lagoon, and Bamboo Island with gourmet picnic lunch.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private catamaran cruise to Phi Phi Islands
Overnight Stay: Phuket (Ultra-Luxury Private Pool Villa)
Meals Included: Buffet Breakfast & Catamaran Gourmet Picnic Lunch

days.title: Sunset Cruise & Spa Immersion
days.description: Floating breakfast. 120-minute couple's spa therapy. Twilight yacht cruise to Promthep Cape.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Twilight yacht cruise, Promthep Cape views
Overnight Stay: Phuket (Ultra-Luxury Private Pool Villa)
Meals Included: Floating Villa Breakfast & Twilight Yacht Canapés

days.title: Phang Nga Bay & Heritage Discovery
days.description: James Bond Island, Koh Hong sea cave kayaking, Old Phuket Town, and Karon Viewpoint.
activities: Sightseeing Included: James Bond Island, Koh Hong kayaking, Old Phuket Town
Overnight Stay: Phuket (Ultra-Luxury Private Pool Villa)
Meals Included: Buffet Breakfast & Authentic Thai Fine Dining Lunch

days.title: Phuket Departure
days.description: Final breakfast at villa. Private transfer to Phuket International Airport.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private airport departure transfer

hotels.name: Pullman Phuket Arcadia Naithon Beach / similar

inclusions.text: 04 Nights in handpicked premium pool villas in Phuket
Premium sparkling wine, floral decorations, and honeymoon amenities
Private catamaran Phi Phi cruise and twilight yacht cruise
International airfare and Thailand visa fees
National park fees and personal expenses
